overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in a 1930s suit walking through a detailed urban city environment with period architecture, vintage automobiles, and pedestrians. The scene transitions from a riverside walkway to busy downtown streets with art deco skyscrapers and a prominent 'WE VOTE DRY' billboard.

events.description: exits narrow riverside passage and emerges onto main city sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along a stone building walkway beside water, then emerging onto the city street

entered.detail: heavy gray stone building with small windows and industrial appearance
black metal railing along the riverside walkway
greenish river water visible beyond the railing
multi-story red brick building with many windows
ornate black vintage street lamp with dual globes

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow riverside walkway with a heavy stone building on the right and a metal railing overlooking green water on the left. The scene opens up as the character emerges onto a wider city sidewalk with red brick buildings visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy urban intersection with vintage traffic

events.description: character stops at street curb to wait for passing traffic
red vintage convertible and yellow taxi pass through the intersection

agents.ego_description: stopping at the street corner to wait for vintage automobiles to pass before crossing

notable_agents.action: red vintage convertible with white sidewall tires driving through the intersection
yellow vintage taxi cab with black fenders driving along the street

entered.detail: large white billboard with black text reading 'WE VOTE DRY' mounted on a building
tall brown art deco tower with setbacks and many windows dominating the skyline
wooden utility pole with traffic signal and overhead wires

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a busy intersection and stops at the curb to wait for traffic. A prominent 'WE VOTE DRY' billboard is visible above the street, and various vintage 1930s automobiles drive through the intersection. The tall art deco skyscraper dominates the center of the view.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront street crossing with mountain views

events.description: character crosses the street and turns to walk along the road edge
walks along waterfront area with view of distant mountains across the water

agents.ego_description: crossing the street and walking along the road edge near the waterfront, observing passing cars

notable_agents.action: vintage brown sedan with beige top driving past the character

entered.detail: stone balustrade railing along the waterfront promenade
hazy mountains visible across the water in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the street and walks along the road near a waterfront promenade, with distant mountains visible across the water. The character passes vintage cars and turns to continue down the street, with the art deco skyscraper remaining prominent in the skyline.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy downtown sidewalk with tram tracks

events.description: character looks up at the tall buildings while continuing to walk
joins a crowd of pedestrians walking in the same direction

agents.ego_description: walking along the busy sidewalk with other pedestrians, passing a blue mailbox and looking up at the towering art deco buildings

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians in 1930s attire including suits and dresses walking ahead
red and cream tram moving along tracks embedded in the street

entered.detail: vintage blue US Mail box with white lettering
wooden water tank on top of a building
vertical sign reading 'LA BELLA GALLERY' mounted on building facade

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a crowded downtown sidewalk, passing a blue US Mail box and walking alongside other pedestrians in period clothing. A red tram moves along the tracks to the right, and the character looks up at the gleaming art deco skyscraper towering overhead. The La Bella Gallery sign is visible on the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a quiet riverside path into the bustling heart of a 1930s downtown district. It begins with the character walking along a narrow riverside walkway between a heavy stone building and a metal railing before the path opens onto a wider city sidewalk. As the character reaches a busy intersection, the view expands to reveal vintage automobiles and a prominent WE VOTE DRY billboard beneath a towering art deco skyscraper. The scene then shifts as the character crosses the street toward a waterfront promenade with distant mountains visible across the water, before turning back into the urban crowd. Finally, the camera moves along a crowded sidewalk past a blue US Mail box and a passing red tram, ending with a gaze upward at the gleaming skyscraper and the La Bella Gallery sign.
